text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's just you, Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's just you, Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I read a scary book before going to bed
last night.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then, I kept thinking about which direction the
plushies on my desk were facing, and how loudly
the clock was ticking...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then everything started to bother me... I couldn't
sleep at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like Rice Shower is sleep-deprived.
Hopefully she's able to get a proper rest soon.
